programme.title: A Black Lady Sketch Show
programme.desc: A neighbourhood gets pumped for the annual Product Purge, Dr Haddassah takes on Career Day, and Keisha bombs at a comedy club.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The tension between Rick and the people of Alexandria comes to a standstill. How will they choose to live? Meanwhile, the impending showdown between Rick and Morgan intensifies.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The tension between Rick and the people of Alexandria comes to a standstill. How will they choose to live? Meanwhile, the impending showdown between Rick and Morgan intensifies.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Just when it looks like things can return to normal, or as normal as things can be in the apocalypse, a new problem arises for the Alexandrians.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Just when it looks like things can return to normal, or as normal as things can be in the apocalypse, a new problem arises for the Alexandrians.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick and a small group run into multiple hurdles while trying to return to Alexandria. The biggest issue: they might not all make it back.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick and a small group run into multiple hurdles while trying to return to Alexandria. The biggest issue: they might not all make it back.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: This episode introduces a new face to the show. With all that's gone on in the apocalypse, can people be trusted? Better yet, can they change?

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: This episode introduces a new face to the show. With all that's gone on in the apocalypse, can people be trusted? Better yet, can they change?

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The mood in Alexandria is quite grim after a number of setbacks. This might prove too much for the sheltered citizens inside the gates.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The mood in Alexandria is quite grim after a number of setbacks. This might prove too much for the sheltered citizens inside the gates.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl, Abraham and Sasha encounter many obstacles and a new threat while trying to return to Alexandria.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl, Abraham and Sasha encounter many obstacles and a new threat while trying to return to Alexandria.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Alexandria is finally able to start pulling itself back together. With that, there's peace between our group and the Alexandrians. But for how long?

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Alexandria is finally able to start pulling itself back together. With that, there's peace between our group and the Alexandrians. But for how long?

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: After having a few moments of peace, trouble finds its way to Alexandria yet again. Only this time, the threat might be too big to defeat.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: After having a few moments of peace, trouble finds its way to Alexandria yet again. Only this time, the threat might be too big to defeat.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: With walkers inside the gates of Alexandria, Rick and the group are scared, outnumbered, and things are only getting worse.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: With walkers inside the gates of Alexandria, Rick and the group are scared, outnumbered, and things are only getting worse.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A seemingly simple scavenging run proves to be very tricky when our group isn't the only one vying for an unexpected supply goldmine.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A seemingly simple scavenging run proves to be very tricky when our group isn't the only one vying for an unexpected supply goldmine.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: After Rick comes to the realisation that Alexandria might not be as safe as he thought, decisions must be made about where to go from here.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: After Rick comes to the realisation that Alexandria might not be as safe as he thought, decisions must be made about where to go from here.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick and the group realise the only way to maintain the peace in Alexandria is to fight a new enemy. This time, though, our group might be outmatched.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick and the group realise the only way to maintain the peace in Alexandria is to fight a new enemy. This time, though, our group might be outmatched.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: After experiencing a minor success, there is a whole new set of issues when members of the group are taken and held hostage.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: After experiencing a minor success, there is a whole new set of issues when members of the group are taken and held hostage.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Two different groups leave Alexandria on supply runs. While both are concerned with the future of the community, immediate danger will derail them.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Two different groups leave Alexandria on supply runs. While both are concerned with the future of the community, immediate danger will derail them.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Alexandria is alerted after realising someone is missing. Several search parties will venture out, but what they find isn't what they're hoping for.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Alexandria is alerted after realising someone is missing. Several search parties will venture out, but what they find isn't what they're hoping for.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick and the group must go outside the walls to save one of their own. What they experience on the road will change their lives forever.

programme.title: Fired on Mars
programme.desc: Millions of miles from his earthbound girlfriend Hannah, graphic designer Jeff finds himself jobless on Mars after his position is unceremoniously eliminated.

programme.title: Fired on Mars
programme.desc: Millions of miles from his earthbound girlfriend Hannah, graphic designer Jeff finds himself jobless on Mars after his position is unceremoniously eliminated.

programme.title: Fired on Mars
programme.desc: A worse-for-wear Jeff lands an internship with the Dreamspiration team and falls under the spell of fanatical executive assistant Jaxton Oliver.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: The much-loved trio of Wayne Brady, Colin Mochrie, and Ryan Stiles are back with host Aisha Tyler presenting the traditional mix of hilarious games, incredible songs, and surprising guests.

programme.desc: All five contestants vying to win Taskmaster Greg Davies' coveted golden head are forced to wrangle some wild animals.

programme.title: Rust Valley Restorers
programme.desc: A major setback in the final stages of restoring a 1964 Parisienne blows Mike's budget. The day of Mike's auction, and the biggest financial gamble of his life, arrives.

programme.title: Rust Valley Restorers
programme.desc: A major setback in the final stages of restoring a 1964 Parisienne blows Mike's budget. The day of Mike's auction, and the biggest financial gamble of his life, arrives.

programme.title: Hotel Paranormal
programme.desc: A security guard encounters a well-dressed spirit at an upscale California hotel. An invisible attacker leaves scratches on a woman. A young girl watches a shadow man emerge from the walls of her hotel suite.

programme.title: Hotel Paranormal
programme.desc: A security guard encounters a well-dressed spirit at an upscale California hotel. An invisible attacker leaves scratches on a woman. A young girl watches a shadow man emerge from the walls of her hotel suite.

programme.title: The Horne Section TV Show
programme.desc: Alex Horne steps out of Greg Davies' shadow as he gets the chance to host his own late-night chat show with his loyal band. But will all go to plan in this mash-up of comedy, celebs, music and mayhem?

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Mark and his team deliver an eight-million-dollar power station to a tiny Micronesian island. Sludge goes into the Western Australian outback to deliver vital fuel supplies to communities cut off by bad weather.

programme.desc: Mark and his team deliver an eight-million-dollar power station to a tiny Micronesian island. Sludge goes into the Western Australian outback to deliver vital fuel supplies to communities cut off by bad weather.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Yogi tries to juggle time with his family and time behind the wheel. Mark faces problems as he struggles to move a power station. Brad trucks an entire workers camp through the red heart of Australia.

programme.desc: Yogi tries to juggle time with his family and time behind the wheel. Mark faces problems as he struggles to move a power station. Brad trucks an entire workers camp through the red heart of Australia.

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: Tyler and Brettly volunteer to tow in a 1947 railroad speeder. Can the shop hop aboard this rapid restoration express or will a low estimate from Tyler cause the job to jump the tracks?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: A seller shoots for the moon when he comes in with some Apollo 11 documents. Can Rick bring him down to earth before we have a problem? Also, a Harley-Davidson 1962 Topper scoots into the shop.

programme.desc: A seller shoots for the moon when he comes in with some Apollo 11 documents. Can Rick bring him down to earth before we have a problem? Also, a Harley-Davidson 1962 Topper scoots into the shop.

programme.desc: When a seller speeds into the shop with an iconic piece of Sammy Hagar memorabilia, Corey calls for back up. Rick has a chance to buy a vintage whiskey strap. Is he willing to pour out some cash?

programme.desc: The 2025 BMW Australian PGA Championship returns to the prestigious Royal Queensland Golf Club, uniting top golfing talent from around the world.

programme.desc: How Good Is Golf shows you how to play, where to play and what equipment to use. Join Paul Gow as he takes you through the greatest game of all.

programme.title: Operation Petticoat
programme.desc: During World War II, a commander finds himself stuck with a decrepit (and pink) submarine, a con man executive officer, and a group of army nurses.

programme.title: Operation Petticoat
programme.desc: During World War II, a commander finds himself stuck with a decrepit (and pink) submarine, a con man executive officer, and a group of army nurses.

programme.title: Innerspace
programme.desc: A test pilot is miniaturised in a secret experiment, and accidentally injected into a hapless store clerk.

programme.title: Innerspace
programme.desc: A test pilot is miniaturised in a secret experiment, and accidentally injected into a hapless store clerk.

programme.title: The 'Burbs
programme.desc: Suburbanite Ray Peterson's plan for a peaceful vacation is disturbed by a creepy new family on the block in this outrageous suspense-comedy directed by Joe Dante.

programme.title: The 'Burbs
programme.desc: Suburbanite Ray Peterson's plan for a peaceful vacation is disturbed by a creepy new family on the block in this outrageous suspense-comedy directed by Joe Dante.

programme.title: Back to the Future
programme.desc: Marty, a typical teen, is accidentally sent back to 1955 in a plutonium-powered time machine. Marty must make sure his teenage parents-to-be meet and fall in love so he can get back to the future.

programme.title: Back to the Future
programme.desc: Marty, a typical teen, is accidentally sent back to 1955 in a plutonium-powered time machine. Marty must make sure his teenage parents-to-be meet and fall in love so he can get back to the future.

programme.title: Tremors
programme.desc: With the help of a seismology student, Val and Earl discover their desolate town is infested with huge man-eating creatures living below the ground. The race is on to defeat these slimy subterraneans.

programme.title: Tremors
programme.desc: With the help of a seismology student, Val and Earl discover their desolate town is infested with huge man-eating creatures living below the ground. The race is on to defeat these slimy subterraneans.

programme.title: Hellboy
programme.desc: Born in hell and bred to be evil, Hellboy was rescued by a benevolent doctor who raised him to be a hero. Now he must thwart a madman who wants to steal his powers and destroy mankind.

programme.title: Hellboy
programme.desc: Born in hell and bred to be evil, Hellboy was rescued by a benevolent doctor who raised him to be a hero. Now he must thwart a madman who wants to steal his powers and destroy mankind.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Families buy rundown chateaux in France, only to find restoration costs spiral far beyond budget. With language barriers and tricky trades, every dream comes with challenges.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Families buy rundown chateaux in France, only to find restoration costs spiral far beyond budget. With language barriers and tricky trades, every dream comes with challenges.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Tim comes across some interesting finds in Lancashire. Margie enjoys a hair-raising activity and builds quite a collection of animal-shaped artefacts.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Tim comes across some interesting finds in Lancashire. Margie enjoys a hair-raising activity and builds quite a collection of animal-shaped artefacts.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: This series travels the country, bringing together in each location, specialists in antiques and fine arts to have them appraise items brought in by local residents.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: This series travels the country, bringing together in each location, specialists in antiques and fine arts to have them appraise items brought in by local residents.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: At an antiques centre in Cheshire, Eric Knowles is overseeing the proceedings, and experts Ben Cooper and Richard Madley will be helping our teams who have some additional shopping challenges.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: At an antiques centre in Cheshire, Eric Knowles is overseeing the proceedings, and experts Ben Cooper and Richard Madley will be helping our teams who have some additional shopping challenges.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Emergency
programme.desc: Eighty-four-year-old Paula has been referred to St George's by her GP for urgent treatment. A routine blood test has detected that Paula has a dangerously high level of potassium, or salts, in her blood.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Emergency
programme.desc: Eighty-four-year-old Paula has been referred to St George's by her GP for urgent treatment. A routine blood test has detected that Paula has a dangerously high level of potassium, or salts, in her blood.

programme.title: The Great British Sewing Bee
programme.desc: Design Icons Week celebrates Diane von Furstenberg, Vivienne Westwood and Versace with challenges inspired by their iconic looks.

programme.title: The Great British Sewing Bee
programme.desc: Design Icons Week celebrates Diane von Furstenberg, Vivienne Westwood and Versace with challenges inspired by their iconic looks.

programme.title: DIY SOS The Big Build
programme.desc: Homeowners try to complete do-it-yourself home projects on their own. But sometimes, they need help finishing the work. That's where presenter Nick Knowles and his team of designers and builders step in.

programme.title: DIY SOS The Big Build
programme.desc: Homeowners try to complete do-it-yourself home projects on their own. But sometimes, they need help finishing the work. That's where presenter Nick Knowles and his team of designers and builders step in.

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: A young family need help with their rural semi in Northamptonshire that's bursting at the seams with their toddler and two dogs. Will they love Kirstie's changes or choose one of Phil's alternatives?

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: A young family need help with their rural semi in Northamptonshire that's bursting at the seams with their toddler and two dogs. Will they love Kirstie's changes or choose one of Phil's alternatives?

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Louis and Isabel's 30 years of marital bliss is being shaken by their house, which they need to either sell or fix. Kirstie and Phil are lending their expertise to help them decide.

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Louis and Isabel's 30 years of marital bliss is being shaken by their house, which they need to either sell or fix. Kirstie and Phil are lending their expertise to help them decide.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: In 2019, Becky and Adam are looking for their first family home. Phil finds them a house but it would stretch their budget if they want to do it up. A tense negotiation lies ahead.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: In 2019, Becky and Adam are looking for their first family home. Phil finds them a house but it would stretch their budget if they want to do it up. A tense negotiation lies ahead.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location Australia
programme.desc: Dana and Kev are living in cramped conditions with her parents while they look for a family home in Adelaide.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location Australia
programme.desc: Dana and Kev are living in cramped conditions with her parents while they look for a family home in Adelaide.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Peter's riverside property has been on the market for over a year and there hasn't been a single offer. Without a sale, he can't start his new life with his partner and daughter.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Peter's riverside property has been on the market for over a year and there hasn't been a single offer. Without a sale, he can't start his new life with his partner and daughter.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: This property is smack bang at the end of the runway of Australia's busiest airport and down the road from the sewerage and desalination plants. Could this possibly be the worst location yet?

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: This property is smack bang at the end of the runway of Australia's busiest airport and down the road from the sewerage and desalination plants. Could this possibly be the worst location yet?

programme.title: Love It Or List It Australia
programme.desc: John and Sharyn, classic empty nesters, have a daggy, dated St Ives Chase 4 bed home. Sharyn wants a sea change, but change resistant John is determined to stay put.

programme.title: Love It Or List It Australia
programme.desc: John and Sharyn, classic empty nesters, have a daggy, dated St Ives Chase 4 bed home. Sharyn wants a sea change, but change resistant John is determined to stay put.

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: Trevor and Jeanette are looking to build a very special home close to nature in which Trevor can move about easily in his wheelchair. When a 15 acre block with river frontage comes on the market, they pounce.

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: Ian and Ann are challenging the norms of their traditional suburb to build a modern and sustainable home that is clad in water tanks. It's a game of ingenuity for a $1.8 million investment.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Emergency
programme.desc: Kirsty faces a severe ankle injury, John struggles to breathe and young Hunter is treated after a fall as families reflect on life's sudden turns.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Emergency
programme.desc: Kirsty faces a severe ankle injury, John struggles to breathe and young Hunter is treated after a fall as families reflect on life's sudden turns.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: The blue lights are flashing as the crews attend a woman with ridiculously high blood pressure, a 20-year-old with chest pains, and a woman who has smashed her face in a fall.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: The blue lights are flashing as the crews attend a woman with ridiculously high blood pressure, a 20-year-old with chest pains, and a woman who has smashed her face in a fall.

programme.title: Sleepers
programme.desc: In a tale of innocence lost and vengeance unleashed, four men plot retribution over their mistreatment in a violent reform school as boys.

programme.title: Sleepers
programme.desc: In a tale of innocence lost and vengeance unleashed, four men plot retribution over their mistreatment in a violent reform school as boys.

programme.title: Cast Away
programme.desc: A FedEx systems engineer's ruled-by-the-clock existence abruptly ends when a harrowing plane crash leaves him isolated on a remote island.

programme.title: Cast Away
programme.desc: A FedEx systems engineer's ruled-by-the-clock existence abruptly ends when a harrowing plane crash leaves him isolated on a remote island.

programme.title: Minority Report
programme.desc: In the year 2054, the head of a police unit specialising in pre-crime - the arrest and conviction of murderers before they commit their crime - finds himself accused of a future murder.

programme.title: Minority Report
programme.desc: In the year 2054, the head of a police unit specialising in pre-crime - the arrest and conviction of murderers before they commit their crime - finds himself accused of a future murder.

programme.title: Takers
programme.desc: A criminal gang attempt one last job with more money at stake than ever. But their plans are interrupted by a detective, hell-bent on solving the case.

programme.title: Trouble with the Curve
programme.desc: Gus Lobel has been a top baseball scout for decades, but age has caught up with him. Enter Gus's estranged daughter, an ambitious attorney who joins him for one last recruiting trip.

programme.title: Trouble with the Curve
programme.desc: Gus Lobel has been a top baseball scout for decades, but age has caught up with him. Enter Gus's estranged daughter, an ambitious attorney who joins him for one last recruiting trip.

programme.title: Money Monster
programme.desc: A financial TV host and his producer are put in an extreme situation when an irate investor who has lost everything forcefully takes over their studio.

programme.title: Money Monster
programme.desc: A financial TV host and his producer are put in an extreme situation when an irate investor who has lost everything forcefully takes over their studio.

programme.title: Rise of the Guardians
programme.desc: When the evil spirit Pitch launches an assault on Earth, the immortal Guardians must join forces for the first time to protect the hopes, beliefs and imagination of children all over the world.

programme.title: Rise of the Guardians
programme.desc: When the evil spirit Pitch launches an assault on Earth, the immortal Guardians must join forces for the first time to protect the hopes, beliefs and imagination of children all over the world.

programme.title: A Sweet Christmas Romance
programme.desc: When a food stylist finds out the owner of her favorite bakery is retiring and sponsoring a baking contest to see who will be her successor, she enters but then is forced to join forces with a rival chef.

programme.title: A Sweet Christmas Romance
programme.desc: When a food stylist finds out the owner of her favorite bakery is retiring and sponsoring a baking contest to see who will be her successor, she enters but then is forced to join forces with a rival chef.

programme.title: One Christmas Eve
programme.desc: A recently divorced mother attempts to create a perfect Christmas for her children's first time without dad, but a series of comic mishaps threaten her best-laid plans.

programme.title: One Christmas Eve
programme.desc: A recently divorced mother attempts to create a perfect Christmas for her children's first time without dad, but a series of comic mishaps threaten her best-laid plans.

programme.title: Trading Places
programme.desc: A story of a down-and-out con artist who trades lifestyles with a well-to-do investor. Two wealthy power players set the wheels turning with a crazy bet and the comedy gets richer by the minute.

programme.title: Trading Places
programme.desc: A story of a down-and-out con artist who trades lifestyles with a well-to-do investor. Two wealthy power players set the wheels turning with a crazy bet and the comedy gets richer by the minute.

programme.title: Christmas on the Vine
programme.desc: A teen discovers the plight of the homeless when a vagrant takes him on a walking tour of Philadelphia landmarks.

programme.title: Christmas in Conway
programme.desc: Hoping it will be the perfect Christmas present for his wife, a man plans to construct a Ferris wheel in his backyard.

programme.title: Raiders of the Lost Ark
programme.desc: An archaeologist hears about a biblical artefact called The Ark of the Covenant, which could hold the key to humanly existence, but he will have to fight a band of Nazis for the lost treasure.

programme.desc: A look at the life of a sex-addict traveling salesman who uses his door-to-door beauty products to meet women.

programme.title: Mix Tape
programme.desc: In 1989, Alison's home life goes from bad to worse as she takes on caring for Peter. In 2015, Daniel struggles with Alison's revelations of what occurred during their relationship twenty years ago.

programme.title: Mix Tape
programme.desc: In 1989, Alison's home life goes from bad to worse as she takes on caring for Peter. In 2015, Daniel struggles with Alison's revelations of what occurred during their relationship twenty years ago.

programme.title: The Time Traveler's Wife
programme.desc: Despite years spent together in the clearing, Henry finally has a chance to step inside Clare's home and meet her difficult-to-please family for the first time.

programme.title: The Time Traveler's Wife
programme.desc: Despite years spent together in the clearing, Henry finally has a chance to step inside Clare's home and meet her difficult-to-please family for the first time.

programme.title: The Time Traveler's Wife
programme.desc: With his and Clare's wedding day fast approaching, a high-stress Henry suddenly begins to travel more than ever and grows increasingly desperate to find a solution.

programme.title: The Time Traveler's Wife
programme.desc: With his and Clare's wedding day fast approaching, a high-stress Henry suddenly begins to travel more than ever and grows increasingly desperate to find a solution.

programme.title: The Death of Bunny Munro
programme.desc: A look at the life of a sex-addict traveling salesman who uses his door-to-door beauty products to meet women.

programme.title: Falco
programme.desc: Falco must deal with the death of his best friend and prove his innocence, after confirming that his fingerprints were on the weapon that ended his life. A murderer kills in the name of God.

programme.title: Falco
programme.desc: Falco must deal with the death of his best friend and prove his innocence, after confirming that his fingerprints were on the weapon that ended his life. A murderer kills in the name of God.

programme.title: The Time Traveler's Wife
programme.desc: Despite years spent together in the clearing, Henry finally has a chance to step inside Clare's home and meet her difficult-to-please family for the first time.

programme.desc: Despite years spent together in the clearing, Henry finally has a chance to step inside Clare's home and meet her difficult-to-please family for the first time.

programme.title: The Time Traveler's Wife
programme.desc: With his and Clare's wedding day fast approaching, a high-stress Henry suddenly begins to travel more than ever and grows increasingly desperate to find a solution.

programme.title: The Time Traveler's Wife
programme.desc: With his and Clare's wedding day fast approaching, a high-stress Henry suddenly begins to travel more than ever and grows increasingly desperate to find a solution.

programme.title: Postcards from the Edge
programme.desc: An actress struggles to rebuild her life after a stint in a drug rehabilitation clinic. This means moving back into her mother's home, an ageing movie star who epitomises 'old Hollywood'.

programme.title: Postcards from the Edge
programme.desc: An actress struggles to rebuild her life after a stint in a drug rehabilitation clinic. This means moving back into her mother's home, an ageing movie star who epitomises 'old Hollywood'.

programme.title: Wedding Wars
programme.desc: In the midst of organising his brother Ben's wedding, Shel, a gay party planner, decides to go on strike for equal rights when he learns that Ben is behind a political speech against gay marriage.

programme.title: Wedding Wars
programme.desc: In the midst of organising his brother Ben's wedding, Shel, a gay party planner, decides to go on strike for equal rights when he learns that Ben is behind a political speech against gay marriage.

programme.title: Murder, She Baked: Choc Chip Cookie
programme.desc: A baker in small-town Minnesota turns into an amateur detective after finding her friend and delivery driver shot to death behind her shop.

programme.title: Murder, She Baked: Choc Chip Cookie
programme.desc: A baker in small-town Minnesota turns into an amateur detective after finding her friend and delivery driver shot to death behind her shop.

programme.title: In My Dreams
programme.desc: After meeting only in their dreams, a man and a woman have seven days to turn their romantic visions into reality.

programme.title: In My Dreams
programme.desc: After meeting only in their dreams, a man and a woman have seven days to turn their romantic visions into reality.

programme.title: For Love Of The Game
programme.desc: When a legendary pitcher strikes out with his girlfriend, he has to play the game of his life. The suspense lasts until the last ball is thrown in this heartwarming drama.

programme.title: For Love Of The Game
programme.desc: When a legendary pitcher strikes out with his girlfriend, he has to play the game of his life. The suspense lasts until the last ball is thrown in this heartwarming drama.

programme.title: Bridesmaids
programme.desc: Annie's life is a mess. But when she finds out her lifelong best friend is engaged, she simply must serve as Lillian's maid of honour.

programme.title: Bridesmaids
programme.desc: Annie's life is a mess. But when she finds out her lifelong best friend is engaged, she simply must serve as Lillian's maid of honour.

programme.title: Megamind
programme.desc: Megamind is the most brilliant super-villain the world has ever known - and the least successful. But when Metro City is threatened by a new villain, can the world's biggest 'mind' actually save the day?

programme.title: Megamind
programme.desc: Megamind is the most brilliant super-villain the world has ever known - and the least successful. But when Metro City is threatened by a new villain, can the world's biggest 'mind' actually save the day?

programme.title: Shaun The Sheep Movie: Farmageddon
programme.desc: When an alien with amazing powers crash-lands near Mossy Bottom Farm, Shaun the Sheep goes on a mission to shepherd the intergalactic visitor home before a sinister organisation can capture her.

programme.title: Shaun The Sheep Movie: Farmageddon
programme.desc: When an alien with amazing powers crash-lands near Mossy Bottom Farm, Shaun the Sheep goes on a mission to shepherd the intergalactic visitor home before a sinister organisation can capture her.

programme.title: Monsters Vs Aliens
programme.desc: Follows the adventures of BOB, Link, Dr Cockroach, and Susan as they learn to adapt to a new world and work side-by-side.

programme.title: Monsters Vs Aliens
programme.desc: Follows the adventures of BOB, Link, Dr Cockroach, and Susan as they learn to adapt to a new world and work side-by-side.

programme.title: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: An experiment with dinosaurs created from DNA becomes a disaster when sabotage sets the prehistoric monsters loose in an island theme park.

programme.title: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: An experiment with dinosaurs created from DNA becomes a disaster when sabotage sets the prehistoric monsters loose in an island theme park.

programme.title: Nanny McPhee
programme.desc: Move over, Mary Poppins. Nanny McPhee is a wonderfully hideous, mysterious nanny hired to tame seven brats with a feckless father.

programme.title: Nanny McPhee
programme.desc: Move over, Mary Poppins. Nanny McPhee is a wonderfully hideous, mysterious nanny hired to tame seven brats with a feckless father.

programme.title: Shrek
programme.desc: An ogre, with the help of an annoying donkey, tries to win back his swamp by returning a princess to a scheming lord.

programme.title: Shrek
programme.desc: An ogre, with the help of an annoying donkey, tries to win back his swamp by returning a princess to a scheming lord.

programme.title: Shrek 2
programme.desc: Happily ever after will have to wait as Shrek, Princess Fiona, and Donkey visit the in-laws. Outraged that Fiona has wed an ogre, the King hires hit man Puss in Boots to make the problem disappear.

programme.title: Shrek 2
programme.desc: Happily ever after will have to wait as Shrek, Princess Fiona, and Donkey visit the in-laws. Outraged that Fiona has wed an ogre, the King hires hit man Puss in Boots to make the problem disappear.

programme.title: Sylvanian Families
programme.desc: In Sylvanian village, everyone awaits the Festival of the Stars, but rabbit girl Freya worries as she must find the Tree of the Year for the main event.

programme.title: Sylvanian Families
programme.desc: In Sylvanian village, everyone awaits the Festival of the Stars, but rabbit girl Freya worries as she must find the Tree of the Year for the main event.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Ninja
programme.desc: An inept warrior is persuaded by a beautiful woman to embark on a dangerous mission into the wilds of Beverly Hills to protect her from her criminal-minded boyfriend and his Yakuza associates.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Ninja
programme.desc: An inept warrior is persuaded by a beautiful woman to embark on a dangerous mission into the wilds of Beverly Hills to protect her from her criminal-minded boyfriend and his Yakuza associates.

programme.title: Babe
programme.desc: A piglet won by a farmer in a raffle is raised by a sheepdog as one of her own and becomes a champion sheep-herder.

programme.title: Babe
programme.desc: A piglet won by a farmer in a raffle is raised by a sheepdog as one of her own and becomes a champion sheep-herder.

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Family Business
programme.desc: Boss Baby continues to navigate the cutthroat corporate jungle gym of Baby Corp, while angling to achieve the near-impossible: the work-life balance of a modern career baby.

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Family Business
programme.desc: Boss Baby continues to navigate the cutthroat corporate jungle gym of Baby Corp, while angling to achieve the near-impossible: the work-life balance of a modern career baby.

programme.title: Despicable Me 2
programme.desc: Get ready for more Minion madness! Just as Gru has given up being super-bad to be a super-dad, the Anti-Villain League recruits him to track down a new criminal mastermind and save the world.

programme.title: Despicable Me 2
programme.desc: Get ready for more Minion madness! Just as Gru has given up being super-bad to be a super-dad, the Anti-Villain League recruits him to track down a new criminal mastermind and save the world.

programme.title: Jumanji: The Next Level
programme.desc: The gang is back but the game has changed. They discover that nothing is as they expect, as they try to escape the world's most dangerous game.

programme.title: Jumanji: The Next Level
programme.desc: The gang is back but the game has changed. They discover that nothing is as they expect, as they try to escape the world's most dangerous game.

programme.title: The Prince of Egypt
programme.desc: This is the extraordinary tale of two brothers, one born of royal blood, one an orphan with a secret past. Their final confrontation will forever change their lives - and the world.

programme.title: The Prince of Egypt
programme.desc: This is the extraordinary tale of two brothers, one born of royal blood, one an orphan with a secret past. Their final confrontation will forever change their lives - and the world.

programme.title: Over the Hedge
programme.desc: The woodland friends awaken from their long winter's nap to discover that a large, green hedge has cropped up right through the middle of their once-natural habitat.

programme.title: Over the Hedge
programme.desc: The woodland friends awaken from their long winter's nap to discover that a large, green hedge has cropped up right through the middle of their once-natural habitat.

programme.title: Good Luck To You, Leo Grande
Good Luck To You, Leo Grande
Last Breath
programme.desc: Based on a true story, veteran deep-sea divers brave brutal ocean conditions to save a trapped crew-mate stranded hundreds of feet beneath the surface.

programme.title: Last Breath
programme.desc: Based on a true story, veteran deep-sea divers brave brutal ocean conditions to save a trapped crew-mate stranded hundreds of feet beneath the surface.

programme.title: American Pie
programme.desc: Four unlucky in love friends who make a pact: lose their virginity by prom night. Manipulating their way into the hearts of some of their classmates, their plans often backfire with hilarity.

programme.title: American Pie
programme.desc: Four unlucky in love friends who make a pact: lose their virginity by prom night. Manipulating their way into the hearts of some of their classmates, their plans often backfire with hilarity.

programme.title: Galaxy Quest
programme.desc: The alumni cast of a cult space TV show have to play their roles as the real thing when an alien race needs their help.

programme.title: Galaxy Quest
programme.desc: The alumni cast of a cult space TV show have to play their roles as the real thing when an alien race needs their help.

programme.title: Evan Almighty
programme.desc: A politician's wish to change the world is heard by God, who asks him to build a modern Noah's ark. The animals and the flood arrive, along with the laughs.

programme.title: Evan Almighty
programme.desc: A politician's wish to change the world is heard by God, who asks him to build a modern Noah's ark. The animals and the flood arrive, along with the laughs.

programme.title: Dr. Seuss' The Cat in the Hat
programme.desc: It starts with two kids on a cold, cold wet day their mum is at work and they've no games to play! Then in walks the fun in the form of a Cat who pulls out the laughs from the brim of his hat.

programme.title: Dr. Seuss' The Cat in the Hat
programme.desc: It starts with two kids on a cold, cold wet day their mum is at work and they've no games to play! Then in walks the fun in the form of a Cat who pulls out the laughs from the brim of his hat.

programme.title: Housos Vs. Authority
programme.desc: A petty crook embarks on a road trip to Uluru in a drug-laden campervan.

programme.title: Housos Vs. Authority
programme.desc: A petty crook embarks on a road trip to Uluru in a drug-laden campervan.

programme.title: Last Vegas
programme.desc: When the group's sworn bachelor finally proposes to his thirty-something girlfriend, four friends head to Las Vegas with a plan to stop acting their age and relive their glory days.

programme.title: Last Vegas
programme.desc: When the group's sworn bachelor finally proposes to his thirty-something girlfriend, four friends head to Las Vegas with a plan to stop acting their age and relive their glory days.

programme.title: Christmas with the Kranks
programme.desc: Fed up with the commercial aspects of Christmas, the Kranks decide to skip Christmas this year and forgo the gifts, the tree, the decorations and to spend the dollars saved on a Caribbean cruise.

programme.title: Christmas with the Kranks
programme.desc: Fed up with the commercial aspects of Christmas, the Kranks decide to skip Christmas this year and forgo the gifts, the tree, the decorations and to spend the dollars saved on a Caribbean cruise.

programme.title: Central Intelligence
programme.desc: A mild-mannered accountant whose glory days are behind him, bumps into a formerly nerdy classmate and is pulled into the high-stakes world of international espionage.

programme.title: Central Intelligence
programme.desc: A mild-mannered accountant whose glory days are behind him, bumps into a formerly nerdy classmate and is pulled into the high-stakes world of international espionage.

programme.title: Holmes & Watson
programme.desc: Holmes and Watson join forces to solve a murder at Buckingham Palace. They soon realise that they only have 5760 minutes to solve the case, or the Queen will be next.

programme.title: Holmes & Watson
programme.desc: Holmes and Watson join forces to solve a murder at Buckingham Palace. They soon realise that they only have 5760 minutes to solve the case, or the Queen will be next.

programme.title: Last Vegas
programme.desc: When the group's sworn bachelor finally proposes to his thirty-something girlfriend, four friends head to Las Vegas with a plan to stop acting their age and relive their glory days.
